title: coleus nitidus
intro: Coleus nitidus is a species of plant within the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the glossy-leafed coleus or velvet coleus. Traditionally, Coleus nitidus has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Coleus nitidus is often used as a dried leaf or root, and can be infused in teas or made into topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
